title: Meta acquires AI agent social network Moltbook
description: Co-founders of Moltbook, a platform for artificial intelligence agents, will join tech giant’s AI research unit
content:
Facebook parent Meta Platforms said on Tuesday it had acquired Moltbook, a social networking platform built for artificial intelligence agents, bringing the company’s founders into its AI research division.

title: VA Launching Major Change That Could Impact Over a Million Veterans
description: The VA plans to use artificial intelligence to review Disability Benefits Questionnaires, or DBQs.
content:
The Department of Veterans Affairs is preparing to roll out a new automated fraud‑detection system that will scan more than a million veterans’ disability claims, a move the agency says is designed to root out abuse.

title: Happiest Minds upgrades FY27 revenue growth guidance to 13% on strong AI demand
